meaning: n.东方人(尤指中国人和日本人)adj.东方诸国的,亚洲的,东方的,(珍珠等)最优质的
examples: There were Oriental carpets on the floors.
This design came to be known as the Oriental style.
The floor was overlaid with rugs of oriental design.
Start off at Thailand Plaza (www.thailandplazala.com), a market next to a kitchy, Oriental-looking tower.
The hotel will debut its special contemporary Asian exhibition, Oriental Charm, on Dec. 6.
